# Compared To What

> Every common AI criticism answered with data and context — interactive companion to the 'compared to what?' framing for evaluating AI's impact in context, not in isolation. This site is one of several maintained by Aragorn Meulendijks (MrMetaverse) — futurist, keynote speaker, AI explorer.

## About this site

- [https://compared-to-what.itsmrmetaverse.com](https://compared-to-what.itsmrmetaverse.com): The interactive site itself.

## About the author

- [Aragorn Meulendijks — main site](https://www.itsmrmetaverse.com/): Profile, keynote topics, contact.
- [Parallax — Deep Research Articles](https://parallax.itsmrmetaverse.com/): Long-form research on AI, exponential change, business strategy.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/itsmrmetaverse/)
- [YouTube — @ItsMrMetaverse](https://www.youtube.com/@ItsMrMetaverse)
